script_text: Listen! Words are made of sounds pushed together.
When we put the sounds together, we call that blending.
Let us try it. It is like a fun puzzle!
Your turn. Listen to three sounds.
Blend them. Sun! You got it!
Here is a helpful trick for blending.
Say each sound out loud. Then say them faster and faster until they snap together.
Now you are ready to practice blending sounds!
